message:
fix: add --no-boot flag to gt sling to avoid witness/refinery lock contention (gt-xu9g)

wakeRigAgents() calls gt rig boot unconditionally after spawning a polecat,
which starts witness and refinery sessions whose startup hooks cause bd lock
contention with sling own writes. Guard all 4 call sites behind --no-boot.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
